Ian was wonderful to with. I really valued his communication - he always kept me in the loop on updates, provided clear instructions when paperwork was needed, and made me feel confident that my case would result in a positive outcome. I would highly recommend working with Ian.

In 2018, I had the very good fortune of beginning to work with Ian.  I had fractured my femur in a work related accident due to the negligence of one of our company's suppliers.

Ian was always patient and kept me abreast of everything.  My phone calls were quickly returned.  He had estimated about 2 years to come to trial, however in 2019,  I retired and moved out of state.  Covid began, cancelling our court date, to an unknown time.

Against Ian’s advice, I chose to settle, even though he said that this could bother me in the future and it was better to go to trial.  Five years later, I began having periodic episodes of pain, with difficulty walking.

Last year, I called Ian to let him know that he  was right and express how much I appreciated working with him.  He’s a fantastic attorney and I can’t recommend him enough.

Excellence... Having to orchestrate and fulfill the requirements to all parties ( Medical exams, therapy, billing, IME, all related information etc.) is quite a task for anyone who has been injured in an auto accident. Ian Henderson is an experienced, knowledgeable and dependable legal representative who navigates you through all aspects of that demanding process with clarity, presence and trustworthy professionalism. A pleasure to work with, Ian is articulate and grounded in legal knowledge and process...I am grateful for his work in securing a  financial settlement for a life changing, serious injury case. He's the best of the best ... ✨✨✨✨✨

We reached out to Ian after a family member was involved in a pedestrian accident.  He came highly recommended by a close friend who had worked with him before and we can't say enough good things about him.  Ian was knowledgeable, patient, and expert at dealing with the insurance companies so that our relative could focus on her recovery.  We highly recommend him.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the outstanding service I received from Ian. After initially struggling with another law firm that unfortunately mishandled my car accident case, I was fortunate to find Ian. He came to my rescue and completely turned my situation around.

From the start, Ian was attentive and incredibly knowledgeable. He reassured me and explained the entire process clearly, making sure I was comfortable with every step. You could really see Ian's dedication as he worked hard to fix the mistakes from the previous firm and helped me get a settlement.

Despite the extra work involved, Ian generously waived his fee due to the complications caused by the previous firm. It’s rare to find a professional so genuinely committed to his clients’ well-being.

Thanks to Ian, I was able to reach a favorable settlement and finally find peace of mind after a long and challenging journey. If you need a lawyer who will go above and beyond for you, I wholeheartedly recommend Ian. He exceeded all my expectations and then some!

Ian was amazing and he worked around the clock to maximize the amount I would receive from my claim. Without his help, I would have been left with a huge medical bill.

I would 100% recommend him. He is very knowledgeable and was always available to talk. He cares for his clients and always put your best interest forward.

Karen Walsh and Katrina Waizer were wonderful, providing outstanding legal advice for a very difficult and complex estate situation. I’m so grateful for their help. I recommend this law firm most highly.

Any questions I had she always took the time out to explain the answers.  She never rushed a conversation and let me know whatever outcome I wanted she would back me up 100%.  She gave great legal advice on how to handle any situation thrown at me by my employer at the time.  I cannot thank her enough for everything she did for me and how she took the time out to listen and help with my case.

She tells me in a blatant answer that although I was involved in a discrimination case I have no proof and she cannot help me and she also went on to state that she does not have to provide any reasoning or proof of reasoning towards not wanting to work with my case

I consider myself fortunate to have been introduced to Claudia who performed flawlessly on my behalf in extremely difficult and trying conditions.  As a senior level executive, my expectations for professionalism and service delivery are high and I can honestly say that Claudia went far above and beyond my expectations to represent my best interests.  She is tenacious and fights for her clients rather than pursuing the path of least resistance.  Her case preparation was extremely thorough and diligent.  When combined with her experience and high level of competence in employment law, she is a formidable adversary to any employer, large or small, who exercises digressions in employment tactics.  It is without reservation that I recommend Claudia's services to handle any employment matter, large or small, that requires legal finesse.
Smart, knowledgeable and accessible. Claudia has expertly represented me since 2014 with several successful contracts negotiations.
Great personality, hard worker, puts the needs of her clients first.
Very knowledgable lawyer, very commendable.

I don't know how they have so many 5-star reviews. My family member was a legal resident with no criminal record, was detained for over a year, and ended up being deported. Throughout this ordeal, they didn't contact us for weeks, couldn't provide me with the documents I requested, etc. It seemed to me that they took on a lot of cases because of this mess with ICE, so they couldn't give mine the attention it deserved. After it ended in deportation, I never heard from these people again, despite having asked them to intervene in some pending matters.

Please don't hire these people and waste your money here. I've lost over $8,000, and they didn't even suggest a refund, at least partially, considering they lost the case.

I don't know how they have all these 5-star reviews. These people consistently dropped the ball on our case. After it ended in deportation I never heard from these people again despite asking them to intervene on a few outstanding matters. Please don't hire these people and waste your money here. You can ask them to do the job you paid for, but they’ll refuse. You can ask for a copy of a sent letter or confirmation that the work was done — but you won’t get a reply for two weeks. Then it turns out the work was never done and they simply forgot about it. Then they’ll miss a court date. And after all that, they’ll call you to remind you about the payment. Draw your own conclusions, but after this experience, all the 5-star reviews feel suspicious and look like flattering fakes.

I would like to express my deepest gratitude to immigration attorney Bogdana Dragos for her professionalism, attentiveness, and genuine desire to help. Thanks to her experience and support, I was able to obtain all the necessary documents and successfully navigate a complicated legal process.

If you are looking for a true professional who genuinely cares about her clients and knows how to handle immigration cases — I sincerely recommend Bogdana Dragos. I’m truly grateful for everything she’s done for me!

Please DON'T TRUST the glowing reviews. Try searching for reviews of Bogdana Dragos as a lawyer. There are NONE, because she is NOT an immigration lawyer. She files all documents under a certain Craig Relles Esq., whom no one has ever seen.
They offer below-market prices to lure people in. After signing a contract and paying, they will take weeks to respond to a simple email.
They lied to me about filing my case and that no action was required on my part for over a year!
They are not interested in a speedy resolution of your case. They show no motivation or interest in you or your case.
Spend another $2,000-$3,000 and hire a good lawyer if you are interested in fast and high-quality work to legalize your stay. Don't make the same mistake I did!

I would not hesitate to turn to Mr. Kelly with any matters I have in the future and whole heartedly recommend him to anyone who is need of legal counsel.

Note: This review pertains to our experience as homebuyers whose closing took place at Ziccardi & Rella’s office. We are not clients of this firm personally; rather their attorneys represented our lender in our home purchase.  We did not have a say in the location of our closing. Aside from our experience that is reviewed below, we cannot speak to the quality of this firm’s legal services or their professionalism in any other matter or situation.

***

My partner and I had a deeply disappointing experience at the offices of Ziccardi & Rella, where our closing took place on March 12, 2025.

Several times during our meeting — while our own real estate attorney was reviewing complex financial and legal documents with us — employees from this firm wandered in and out of the conference room to use the copy machine next to the table where we were seated. In addition to the noise created by the copy machine, Ziccardi & Rella staff repeatedly initiated loud personal conversations with each other, with the sellers’ attorney, and with the other professionals who were there because we had retained them to represent us in this transaction. Ziccardi & Rella staff joked and shouted to each other from across the room, completely ignored us, and generally behaved as if they were hanging out in the staff break room.

The repeated interruptions during our closing by Ziccardi & Rella employees was not only unprofessional and disrespectful, but incredibly distracting from the important task at hand. We couldn’t hear everything our lawyer was saying to us, and we asked several times for them to lower their voices or take their conversations elsewhere as it didn’t seem to pertain to our closing. If the conversations were relevant to our closing, that was not communicated to us. In response to our requests, they brought it down to a whisper, but it was clear by their attitude and body language that they had little regard for us and our needs for quiet and privacy.

A few minutes later, someone else would walk in and begin talking again, as if they were completely unaware - or just didn’t care - that there was a formal meeting under way. This is unacceptable.

If you are expecting to be treated with professionalism, privacy, and respect during a real estate transaction, I would not recommend Ziccardi & Rella offices as an appropriate location for a closing or any other important meeting.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are very sorry that your closing experience did not go the way it should have and we apologize for any noise and distractions that occurred. Closings often have many people attending and can sometimes get loud especially when the parties present are familiar with each other. However, that does not excuse any interruptions that took place. Again, we apologize that the atmosphere in your closing did not provide you with the experience you deserve. We strive to be respectful and courteous to all clients visiting our office and it is disappointing to know that this was not your experience. If you have any questions or further concerns, please do not hesitate to contact either one of the partners.

I have spoken with a lot of attorneys over the years. Most of them talk like attorneys. They use language to obscure rather than clarify. They pad everything. They make simple things complicated because somewhere along the way they learned that complexity signals competence.
Rose is different. She communicates the way a trial attorney should. Plainly. Directly. She knows that the person across from her, whether it is a jury or an adjuster or a client, is just a person trying to understand what is happening. So she tells them. Clearly.
She is sharp. She sizes up a situation quickly and acts on what she sees. There is no wasted motion. No hedging. She knows what she thinks and she will tell you.
She is also genuinely tough. Not the performed toughness you see in people who are trying to convince you. The real kind. The kind where you walk away thinking, I am glad she is on my side.
If you are looking for someone who will actually fight for you and who will not waste your time doing it, Rose is that person.

Michael Borrelli is an ace criminal defense attorney. If you hire Michael Borrelli, it’s over.  Michael Borelli is passionate about what he does, he works very hard to ensure that people’s rights are protected to the highest degree. Michael clearly loves what he does and it shows through his wide spread respect amongst court personnel and judges all over Westchester. Michael’s court room presence is powerful and instills confidence each time I went for an appearance. Judges have great respect for him because they know he is all about business. Michael Borelli  speaks up to make sure that the system of justice is fair for each client he represents. He makes sure that the system does not get oppressive. Mr. Borelli doesn’t cut corners. When lawyers cut corners innocent people start getting hurt. To me civil liberties are a great heritage for Americans, they are not rights that the government gives people. To me, they are the rights that the people carved out for themselves. Michael protects people from prosecution. Michael Borrelli is one of New York’s best criminal defense attorneys. He began his career as a prosecutor in Westchester County. Michael Borelli pours out his heart and his soul in the courtroom. His successful strategy has led to each case I’ve had with Mr. Borelli to be disposed of in a favorable manner that he ultimately predicted from the start of the case. He is fair and reasonable. He does not find ways to charge more money by pushing people to trial. In fact it is just the opposite. I was insistent on going to trial in a case handled by Mr. Borelli and he told me to calm down and let him do his job. Boy was I glad I placed my trust in him rather than doing it my way. He was confident my case would never see the inside of a jury trial and he was right. He got my case dismissed outright in a very, very efficient and speedy manner. I could go on and on about Michael’s ability to defend his clients in their darkest times as a criminal defendant but hopefully I’ve made it clear that if you find yourself fighting the state of New York on any criminal matter, Mr. Borelli is the ONLY person I want by my side, fighting for my rights and freedom. He is very reasonable in pricing and very straightforward and easy to deal with.

Mr Borrelli represented me on a misdemeanor case that had the potential to have a significantly negative impact on my personal and professional lives. He took my case after I was dissatisfied with my previous representation. The difference was more than appreciable. Mr. Borrelli worked above and beyond my expectations. He started by asking for an initial interview, during which I had the chance to explain my side of the story. He gave me all the time that I needed, and recorded all of my thoughts and leanings. He then explained how the case would be expected to go based on his very significant experience, highlighting general trends and expectations for this sort of case. Finally, he fought extremely hard for the desired outcome, pushing back against initial deals that he didn't think were fair or consistent with expected norms. He was ultimately able to resolve the case with what I thought was the best case scenario, in a context that was very difficult and challenging.

I would add two notes here:

1] Although Mr Borrelli now works on the side of the defense, he previously had a long history on the prosecution's side, which gives him not only unique perspectives on their thinking but has also afforded him good contacts and relationships that facilitate negotiation and compromise with them.

2] Mr Borrelli was the second lawyer that I hired on my case, after I was dissatisfied with my intiital attorney. The difference in effort was very apparent. He really did fight hard to achieve our desired result, and went above and beyond in terms of pushing against initial deals offered, and arguing passionately for the result that he felt was the most fair.

I fully and passionately recommend Mr Borrelli, and cannot sufficiently convey how much I appreciated his efforts on my behalf.

Michael Borrelli possesses all the skills necessary for a great criminal attorney. He not only has great communication skills, but is as good a listener as he is a speaker. Michael is extremely knowledgeable about the law, sharp, and on top of his game as a criminal attorney.  Michael engaged aggressively with my case and let nothing slip by unnoticed. Michael gives his clients’ 100% of himself and uses his best efforts. I felt that he held himself personally responsible for resolving my case.  With 20 plus years of experience practicing criminal law, as well as a prior position in the Westchester DA’s office, Michael knows the legal system.  He understood that many times justice is not found in domestic cases, and that charges can be exaggerated or “trumped up” in he said/she said” situations.   Michael not only had empathy for my particular legal situation, he understood the serious & negative impact the legal issue had on my life.  Not only does Michael have integrity, but cares about his clients and the direction their case is taking.  He was also proactive in incorporating the information I provided him into my defense strategy, able to argue forcefully “off the cuff” and was always ready & available to me, without delay.
I would absolutely recommend Michael Borrelli to anyone who is looking for a sharp skilled lawyer with the compassion of a friend who is more like family.
I was extremely happy with the outcome of what could have been criminal charges. Not only did he have my charges reduced to a violation, but he also went as far as making sure that all my records were cleaned up and deleted from all criminal databases. I’m very grateful for choosing him as my lawyer, and I would not hesitate referring him to all my friends and family. Michael, once again, thank you for everything.

Called to inquire about representation. Mr Kurtis was dismissive and curt.
Manners, decency, or tone go a long way, no matter how short a conversation.

I hired Glen Kurtis for a Civil Supreme Court Case in Nassau County to sue for unpaid monies on a loan that was given. From the moment he was hired, he was on top of the case  and was so professional throughout the entire case. Glen guided me and updated me at every twist and turn of the case by either calling me, texting or e-mailing me. Glen took all my calls and returned everyone of my calls ,texts or emails quickly, as soon as he was available. He made me feel 100% comfortable and secure and that I was in good hands, and felt very confident with his knowledge of the law. He answered all my questions correctly, and we were successful with having the judge award me a judgement for full repayment of the loan plus the interest that was agreed upon by the defendants. He fought very hard and stern for this decision and was always timely to write up and file all papers that were needed. Bravo for his professionalism and a great result. I would use Glen Kurtis Esq in the future in a heartbeat and will recommend him to anyone who needs a great lawyer to represent them without hesitation. I am 100% sure that anyone who uses Glen will not be disappointed in the way he handles their case as their lawyer.

Mom is now home where she belongs being cared for by her family.  We are looking forward to many happy days ahead. We cannot thank you enough!

Mr. Khayumov is an excellent attorney: it was immediately evident that he knows the intricacies of law pertaining to the elderly, and he knows how to explain it, patiently and clearly--focusing on the broad picture but also understanding how certain aspects of the law (for example, health care, estate planning, etc.) are specifically relevant to individual clients. In other words, Mr. Khayumov takes the time to patiently listen to his elderly clients, asks questions, and clarifies when necessary. Moreover, his genial, respectful warmth and straightforward way of interacting puts people at ease about subjects that often can be uncomfortable or confusing, irrespective of one's age. I would return to Mr. Khayumov for his legal counsel any time in the future that the need might arise.

My family retained Littman Krooks to assist in a transfer of guardianship case.  We were first attracted to the firm’s partner, Amy O’Hara, and her experience with guardianships, special needs, and estate planning.  These were all components in our need for services.  While Amy was the lead on our case, Joel Krooks and Stephanie Goldstein, were the two attorneys we worked most closely with, along with Brian Miller.  We have been very pleased with all of these attorneys. They are very knowledgeable in their fields and made us feel confident from the outset that they would be able to help us with all we required.  We have been impressed with their responsiveness to our emails and calls.  They are compassionate and understanding with the issues of our case and have been able to fully guide us through the legalities and processes required in our complicated circumstances.  Joel, in particular, has been a source of calm and reassurance when things have become particularly stressful. We have been especially comfortable in knowing that Amy is involved in the oversight of our case.  Additionally, our contact with all of the staff has been courteous and pleasant.  We would recommend Littman Krooks without hesitation—their professionalism, respectfulness and consideration are valuable and important to us as our needs for their services evolve over these next years.

I had the pleasure of working with Andrew Weitz recently, and I cannot speak highly enough of his professionalism, knowledge, and dedication. From our first meeting, it was clear that Andrew is not only a skilled attorney but also a responsible and compassionate individual who genuinely cares about his clients.
Andrew took the time to fully understand my case, explaining the legal process in a way that was both clear and reassuring. His communication was always prompt, thoughtful, and thorough—whether it was through emails, phone calls, or in-person meetings, I always felt informed and well-prepared for the next steps.
What stood out most to me was Andrew’s commitment to achieving the best possible outcome while keeping my best interests at the forefront. He was transparent about potential challenges but was also proactive in developing a strategy that minimized risks and maximized our chances of success. His attention to detail was evident, and I never once felt rushed or left in the dark about the progress of my case.
Beyond his legal expertise, Andrew’s ethical standards and sense of responsibility were truly impressive. He is someone who not only understands the law but also takes the time to ensure that his practice aligns with the highest standards of integrity. In a world where it can sometimes feel like attorneys are motivated by profit over people, Andrew’s approach was a refreshing reminder that there are still professionals who genuinely care about doing what’s right.
I would wholeheartedly recommend Andrew Weitz to anyone in need of legal representation. His combination of experience, integrity, and dedication makes him an outstanding choice for anyone seeking a lawyer they can trust.
Sincerely,
Marvin Kaplan

What I'm most grateful for is that Joe was able to tease out and decipher some really critical terms of the publishing contract offer that were not easily understood because of the legalese in which they were written. These terms were deal-breakers for me, and had I not hired Joe, I would have unknowingly agreed to them. His patience, eye for detail, critical analysis, combined with his deep expertise, guided the conversations I had with publisher, and ultimately clarified the terms of the contract that were in question. After Joe helped me understand all the terms of the contract, I ultimately decided to not move forward with the contract, but am incredibly thankful that I didn't. I would have certainly regretted signing the contract at some point when I realized the implications. After I decided to not sign the contract, Joe also drafted of an NDA release agreement that helped establish a mutually favorable path forward for me and the publisher. If I have any further publishing legal needs, Joe is going to be the first attorney I reach out to!

reviews.text:
I contacted Urba Law a few years ago, after an incident at the office.  There had been a pattern of discrimination and abuse for a while at my work place, and one of the managers didn't care a comment I made illustrating those conditions.

I was affected by the verbal abuse & the failure of management to schedule status meetings & other reasonable concession, which were afforded to other employees.  But I had resources to help me with that psychologically, although it wasn't easy.

What I could NOT get past, was the feeling that I was helpless, and that management could do anything they wanted.  And that maybe I was just a complainer, and was overblowing perfectly natural conditions that everyone has to deal with.

My Urba rep helped with this.  They gave me clear instructions on what NOT to do, like being combative or threatening my managers with Union or Legal retribution.  Just continue documenting everything, don't be sarcastic at the office, try to stay calm.

Incidentally, the Union was of NO help at all, in dealing with this.  Sometimes, you need an outside resource like Urba to advocate for you.  Unions are not a substitute for this kind of service.

I live in NY State, which is very accommodating when it comes to allowing recordings, so I took advantage of that.  I documented everything, and Urba helped guide me on how to do that.

I made it through the rest of my time at this corruptly run agency, and have been happily employed & appreciated at my current position for the past several years.  I don't know what I would have done, how sick I would have gotten, without the advice from Urba Law.

One VERY important piece of advice, was to test for Autism.  This has never occurred to me previously, but would explain many of the experiences in my life.  Turned out Urba's instincts were exactly correct.

I didn't really have an interest in going to court over this, but my Urba rep made it clear that there was a valid reason to consider & explore it.  That knowledge made all the difference.

Thanks, J.U.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you! It was my pleasure to help. Listening carefully is very important and understanding people and the challenges faced at work is why some of us love doing this work. So glad it worked out and all the best in doing what you obviously do well. Managers sometimes are clueless or simply do not listen nor understand. Your review confirms why we do this work. Stay healthy and gainfully employed especially when you have obviously found what works for you. Many unfortunately never do.

Went to this office today to have a testament sign and notary but they wouldn’t provide the service because the testament wasn’t written by their lawyer and they could be liable. My understanding is that a public notary’s job is to verify the identity of the signer and ensuring they are signing the document presented to him.
This office is very uninformed!
reviews.ownerResponse: This client is uninformed. He needed at least two witnesses to attest to his signature and he pretended that the office staff be his witnesses. When the staff refused the he got upset! A notary cannot force his staff to be witnesses in a legal document against their will. This client is just attempting to cast us on a bad light. That is all.
We appreciate your support Luisa!

reviews.text:
I had an in-person consultation with Pablo and was genuinely impressed by the level of professionalism and kindness I received. I traveled over an hour and a half to meet with him, hoping for guidance regarding my case. After reviewing my situation, the attorney explained with honesty and clarity that my case wasn't suitable for their services.

While many professionals might simply end the conversation there, he went above and beyond. He made sure I understood why my case didn’t fall within his scope of services, answered my questions with patience, and even took the time to arrange transportation to send me home safely. That level of care and consideration is rare these days.

I left with a deep sense of respect and appreciation for how I was treated—as a person, not just a potential client. If you're looking for someone who is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely thoughtful and respectful, I would recommend this lawyer.

Honestly waste of time and money Pablo Fernandez-Herrera belittled us acted like a fortune teller with his "fortune- telling ball" unfortunately I didn't come to see a comedian but a lawyer who can be professional. Also the staff in the front needs to be better in the customer service.

About a year ago, I visited attorney Pablo's office. The service I received was very professional. He was very kind and professional, and I highly recommend him to anyone needing legal assistance in this country. If I could give them 10 stars, I would. The entire staff was very professional. Thank you very much.

Pablo is a dedicated and straightforward attorney who plays no games. He will tell you in the first consultation whether your case has any hope or not, whether there's any law that could work for you. If he takes your case, you have to trust his and the paralegals' instructions word by word. His team is professional, and you can count on more attorneys like Frances and Holly.

Pablo is efficient; he doesn't waste time on lies. He will tell you in the first appointment if your case has a future or if there is a law that will help you achieve legal status. Many reviews complain about the staff's attitudes, but the reality is that when you want a good lawyer, you should forget about those things and focus on what matters: efficiency and honesty. Only that will get you a green card.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Paula: thank you so much for those kind words and yes, we strive to provide to the public an honest assessment of their cases and to guide them thru the rough waters in which we are all navigating today!

reviews.text: Excellent 👍👍 I recommend them 100%!

Great location to bring your legal stuff
Personally great services
the lawyer and staff are very professional in their work, they took care of my case as soon as possible.  with a lot of ethics I really recommend it.
Excellent lawyer, 100% recommended
I haven't gone yet. I have an appointment with him this coming Saturday, but after reading the comments, I'd rather not go. 😒 I'm not going to give him money, and he's the one who's stuck with it...

The worst service I've ever received. I went there just to submit an immigration application and couldn't even speak to the lawyer. When I went to pick up my documents and get my money back, they refused to provide any service, were incredibly arrogant and rude, and were completely disrespectful. The lawyer only came out of his office to insult me ​​and push me out. There's absolutely no respect; this lawyer is the worst and thinks he's all that.
Terrible service, the lawyer and staff are very rude.  the lawyer has no respect for anyone and he takes advantage of people.  never go there
Attorney Pablo Fernández is an honest, sincere, professional, and loyal lawyer. I highly recommend him.

I had a good experience with this lawyer about eight years ago. I've sent him several clients since then, and he's resolved their issues. However, lately, he's become very rude and arrogant, treating other clients very poorly. He charges exorbitant fees, even for asking a question, and his employees are afraid to even speak to him. I don't recommend him.

A friend recommended me a lawyer. She spoke highly of him. And when he attended to me, it was the worst thing that could have happened to me. And I left shocked by the attention of this man who supposedly claims to be a lawyer. Anyway, the only thing I can say and recommend to people is not to go there, don't waste your money. I paid 100 for nothing. When I left, I called the person who recommended me and told him so. And he said, "It's true, he's rude." And why didn't he tell me before so I wouldn't give away my money?

Mr. Fernández is the best ! Back in 2019 he helped me obtained my green card , he was always calling me and my parents to update us on the case. And when it was the time to travel to my home country for the consulate visa, He had everything ready to go. He is very honest and direct ! My process was successful ! I highly recommend him.  You listen to him and all will go well !!!

We hired the services of attorney Pablo Fernández, and we are very disappointed. He hasn't even wanted to return our call for a year, waiting and calling, and the ladies at the front desk, especially, are very rude. I don't know if they've let the attorney know how much we've wanted to talk to him and learn about my husband's case, but it really is a disaster here at this place!

PLEASE DO YOUR BEST BEFORE COMING HERE. THERE MAY BE BETTER PLACES AND THEY CAN HANDLE YOUR CASE SUCCESSFULLY.

My case is an immigration case, and you know how much faith one puts in a lawyer to be successful in this.

Now no one shows up, not even the attorney, and they've banned us from coming to the office. I have the right to ask to go there, but they are truly rude.

I hope the attorney doesn't know about our calls now, he can call us.

I do not recommend this at all!
Best attorney ever, know him for many years, best team, honest, lot of knowledge, I definitely would recommend him.

I went to speak with attorney Pablo Fernández in December. I had a bad experience. He told me I was an empty object who didn't believe in God and that my bag was a designer bag. I was the biggest disappointment of my life. I paid $100 for him to insult me. It was practically psychological violence he caused. He's an abuser. As a human being, we deserve respect. I never thought he would treat me like that. I don't recommend him.

If I could give him zero stars, I would. This man is incredibly rude and arrogant. If you call to inquire about your case, he gets angry and hangs up. He speaks to clients as if they owe him money, and on top of that, he charges $100 every time you visit him, plus the fees for sending paperwork and his own legal fees. Please don't go to this "lawyer"; look for someone with better professional ethics. And good luck—don't let yourself be deceived or mistreated by this man who calls himself a lawyer.

Went into the office to leave some documents .
While I waited my turn I had the unpleasant experience of seeing the Lawyers secretaries gossiping about one of their coworkers. I believe they didn’t know I spoke Spanish and they made very rude remarks and comments . This was a very unprofessional experience unfortunately since I was waiting for that secretary to come back since I had to give her the documents.
I work in an office and can honestly say the lawyers secretaries need to work on their professionalism.
I went to have a letter notarized and the person was very rude to me, lacking education and respect. I left and upon crossing the street I found another notary who was very kind and respectful.

Great service! Pablo, Esther, and Sammy were very helpful, honest, and caring. I did my entire green card process with them. They went above and beyond to help my immigration case. I highly recommend them!

Great service! Pablo, Esther, and Sammy are very helpful, professional, and honest. I did my entire green card process with them, and they always provided me with exemplary service. I recommend them for all immigration cases!
The best immigration lawyer! Trustful and honest.
It's good, I like it. The way it works!

(writing for a friend who doesn't have a gmail)
He was give $500 to open a case on 2014, however, it is now 2020 absolutely no progress has been made. We called USCIS and there had been no change in address or him as attorney on file at all. He tried to tell us to go to school in order to get papers. Found another attorney who we paid less to and got the residency papers done in a year and a half LEGALLY.  It's sad to see how people take advantage of others.

James Monteleon worked on my criminal case. I am so happy and grate full I had him as my lawyer. The process was fast, I can only tell you to be patient when he says don’t worry. Believe me he knows the law. What a great experience with a lawyer like him. Would totally recommend him. Thanks again, for all your hard work
Alyssa brings  both intellectual and emotional intelligence to her clients.  She is kind, collaborative and a true client advocate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind review Megan, we appreciate your feedback!

reviews.text:
Everyone at Monteleon Law helped make the nerve wracking process of creating a Last Will and Testament a walk in the park.
Very, very grateful for all their help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review, Jackie!
We appreciate your review, thank you!

reviews.text: I am currently a client James Monteleon, Esq.  James, makes the situation clear, very knowledgeable and  easy to deal with. James, and his staff provides me with updates about   surrogate court and I  am well represented in a sensitive situation .All my concerns have been addressed .This is my GO TO LAW FIRM WITH ANY LEGAL ISSUES THAT MAY ARISE IN THE FUTURE.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so very appreciative of your thoughtful review, Charlie.  It is always in our best interest to make sure our firm performs in an efficient and productive manner.  If you should ever find that you are in need of our services again, please don't hesitate to contact us.  Thanks again, Charlie!

reviews.text: The Monteleon Law Group provided outstanding and professional service to my brothers and I  They assisted us with securing some of our Dads assets.  They were prompt, friendly,  professional and very knowledgeable.  I would highly recommend their services to those who need it.
Absolutely the best law group I've ever worked with. Communicative, affordable and swift. I could not ask for more.

We initially contacted Alyssa for routine Elder Law advise. Alyssa is clear, responsive and helpful. Unfortunately my Aunt became suddenly ill. Alyssa went above and beyond in being available to turn documents around very quickly (on a weekend) and arranging to be available to guide us through document signing. This is a very stressful time for us. Alyssa was truly the calm in the storm. I’ve never before  worked with such a kind, compassionate and responsive  attorney. We are so grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review!

reviews.text:
Alyssa

I was in search for an elder law attorney to handle my mother’s affairs since she was in the nursing home and I really needed the help and had no knowledge of how the process worked and which way to turn. A family friend referred Alyssa to me and that was the best thing in the world.
From the time I was introduced to Alyssa she is very professional and definitely knows her craft inside and out. Alyssa walked me through the whole process and was very patient and flexible throughout the whole process which put me at ease. I would recommend this Five star Attorney anyone that may need one!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review!

reviews.text: Alyssa was a lifesaver for our family who unexpectedly had to handle a friend's estate. She quickly and professionally answered our questions and took care of some aspects of the estate that we wanted assistance with. I highly recommend this group.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review!

reviews.text:
My experience with Alyssa was nothing less than exceptional.  As a 83 year old retiree, I wanted to quickly get my house in order for my children’s sake and Alyssa did just that!  She was thoughtful and accommodating from start to finish.  Alyssa put in place a comprehensive estate planning package that clearly expresses my final wishes and conveys my love for my kids and grand-kids.  I highly recommend her for her personal style and expertise.

Best, Gerald Gumora
This was my #1 choice for what I needed. Alyssa Monteleon and her firm were professional, very responsive and a pleasure to work with. Wouldn't go anywhere else! Thank you Monteleon Group!
Personalized, compassionate, knowledgeable, experienced Law Group. Guided me and my family through the labyrinth of estate planning. Very available for any and all questions.

Hi Allyssa has a very special gift of explaining the estate laws to you in a gentle and kind way. She is very thorough and professional. Her timely response to all our matters were handled quite well. We give her five stars for an outstanding job done in our estate planning. Thank you!!

My experience with Alyssa Monteleon was nothing short of exceptional.  Her expertise, empathy, willingness to go the extra mile, answer every email and text, work on nights and weekends, etc.  I can go on and on.  Alyssa is smart, proactive, and knows her trade.  I have and would recommend her to all of my friends, associates, and family.  I could not have asked for a better final product, and had a better experience in putting together my estate.  Hire her!

I was working with James Monteleon on a matter unrelated to my parents. Simultaneously, my father was very sick and near his end so we had to start some estate planning work. It was a stressful time for sure. He guided us on both matters and implemented the first round of estate papers. In the end, we resolved our case and after my father passed away he recommended that I speak to Alyssa.

I first met for a consultation where she provided a lot of information. She then met with my mother and took her time, answered all her questions and put my mother at ease. Alyssa, helped my mother/us revamp the trust estate plan and will documents. Shortly after, all the documents were legally restated. Both my mother and I felt relieved once everything was official and signed.

I found both James and Alyssa to be not only knowledgeable, but compassionate and understanding when it comes to personal family matters. I would highly recommend the Monteleon Law group.

Alyssa Monteleon is a fantastic lawyer. She did everything possible for me and my case . Also answer all my questions and made it very simple to understand what was going on with the case. I would recommend her to anyone who needs a lawyer.

I hired Alyssa and her company to represent me in my mother’s estate and Alyssa did a fantastic job very efficient she went over and above she was helpful and she was always precise with everything I was very happy with my outcome and she made everything so much easier for me I recommend Her and her company to whom ever is looking for an estate attorney I am very pleased and now I am at peace and I can finally move forward with my life thanks to Alyssa and her company. I give her and her company 10 stars plus

My husband and I have had the pleasure to  work with The Monteleon Group on several occasions. Alyssa took the time and had the patience  to walk us through and set up a proper estate plan, leaving us worry free.
We also worked with Alyssa and her father Jim on a stressful, complicated court case, and again appreciated the time and patience they gave us.
They explain everything in a professional, and at the same time friendly manner.
We would highly recommend this law firm to anyone needing a lawyer.

Alyssa Monteleon of Monteleon Law Group provided my wife and I with an excellent experience in creating our estate planning documents. Alyssa took the time to explain in detail the documents and how our needs could be taken in to account. We spent about an hour for an initial consultation, and then Alyssa provided us with draft documents for review. Once complete, we met again, and all of the details were taken care of. We provided a final review, and the office staff served as witnesses to the signature process. I would most enthusiastically recommend Alyssa and her group for any estate planning needs.

Monteleon is the best lawyer to have your side. He is dedicated to his work and helping you whatever the case is. He listens he tells you like it is , and handles all cases as his own. My experience as a women i was being bullied & lied to by man in the adjusting business and wasn't being paid for my services for 10 months, i hired Monteleon he took over the case and within a month i was paid in full. He is now my lawyer for life. I won't have  any other on my side then Mr. Monteleon.

The Monteleon Law Group provides unparalleled legal services . James Monteleon represented me during my divorce in 2016. He was professional, diligent , compassionate and most importantly very kind to my family and I as we were going through a very difficult time. I highly recommend this group for  anyone who needs legal services!!! James as well as the other lawyers will go above and beyond to meet there clients needs.
Speranza Carrizzo- Soden

We have worked with Monteleon Law Group for various legal matters and found the entire firm’s diligence and level of service to be exceptional. Our most recent interaction was with Ms. Monteleone.  She is the epitome of professionalism. She took the time to listen, ask questions, and to really think about what we needed and helped us figure out what works best. Most attorneys have expertise, but only a few have both expertise and great emotional intelligence.  She’s knowledgeable and a pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend using them to anyone who requires legal services.

This Monteleon Law Group has been my legal counsel for many years They have represented me in court cases assisted me with bank modifications and estate planning. In all of these they have been professional and diligent always with one thing in mind there client . If you are looking for representation look no further you will not regret it.
Best Lawyer ive ever had

Michael J. Raneri and the team at Raneri, Light & O’Dell PLLC provided exceptional support and expertise during a challenging co-op case. From the start, Michael navigated complex issues with our co-op board and their lawyer, skillfully handling difficult conversations and advocating for us at every step. He anticipated potential hurdles and proactively addressed them, helping us feel confident and informed throughout the entire process. Michael’s professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment made a stressful situation manageable, and we couldn’t be happier with the outcome. I highly recommend Michael and his team to anyone in need of knowledgeable and reliable legal representation.

Yankwitt LLP, more specifically Alicia Tallbe, representing me has been one of the best decisions I have made. The professionalism and clear communication are, without a doubt, above expectations, but it was Alicia and her team's empathy that really stood out to me. I was treated like a person, not just another case file, and it was through their hard work and dedication, I achieved the outcome I had wanted. I am extremely grateful for their representation and would definitely recommend them to anyone in need of strong, smart, compassionate legal support.

In 2019, I was the target of a nuisance lawsuit and was referred to Russ Yankwitt’s firm by a retiring, highly respected corporate litigator. My case was handled by their team and led by Partner Alicia Talbe. Over the course of several months—and often through daily communication—Alicia had my back at every step. I had an extensive number of files and documents to provide throughout the process, all of which she reviewed carefully and used to build a strong defense. She and her team explained the court system clearly and consistently, and not once did I feel overwhelmed or as if I was facing an uphill battle. Their professionalism, confidence, and support made all the difference.
I would recommend that anyone searching for a professional, easy-to-communicate-with, no-nonsense law firm—one with a clear understanding of the legal wranglings of the New York court system—reach out for at least an initial interview with the Yankwitt team. I could not have been happier with the outcome of the lawsuit against me, which was ultimately settled in my favor. Thank you Alicia, Russ, and all!

Yankwitt are a class act and provide iron-clad defense when you need a really strong and ethical team.
My husband and I recommend Yankwitt routinely to friends and family for matters requiring a thoughtful litigation practice with high customer service.
We originally interviewed Yankwitt based on the calibre of the attorneys and Russ Yankwitt's own background, especially prior corporate experience at the'white-shoe' law firms we habitually employ for business dealings. This learned high standard of corporate care alongside the DA office experience of the Yankwitt team are key differentiators in my opinion. Russ assigned Jason Swergold, an experienced litigator, to our unusual case in the Family Courts of Upstate New York. Requiring in-court appearances as well as still-ongoing strategy in negotiations with other attorneys, Jason has proven his value time and time again. He is thoughtful, strategic, sensible and knows how to gain the upper hand through a strongly ethical approach. We are very grateful to have him head our team.
Of particular note is the complete fairness we have experienced in his charging, which speaks to the principled management at the helm of this firm. When we all know the sharp side of legal billing can bite you hard....not here.
Yankwitt make money because they are amongst the best, not because their billing is aggressive. This is a great relief and contributes to our ongoing trust in Jason's advice. We have trusted Jason  to bring additional legal specialists to advise on key areas requiring expertise, and his selection of these other attornets has also been unerringly strong.
Very grateful for our engagement with Yankwitt, though we can certainly wish for better circumstances, we trust the team to guide us well.

Yankwitt LLP, and specifically attorney Jason Swergold, have earned my eternal gratitude and respect. They took over my contentious case- where multiple law firms previously had been unsuccessful, and achieved a desirable outcome. I would recommend them again and again. Thank you to Russ, Jason and the entire team for your excellence.

For the first time, I truly feel, someone (Yankwitt LLP and Jason in particular) has gone out of their way for me. I’ve dealt with a federal legal issue on and off for the last 15 years. I’ve had 2 other layers blow through and not provide any real resolution. I've had a 3rd tell me I need a Presidential Pardon as my only option. Yet within 2 months, you've stuck through the general disregard I and the other lawyers had received from the other party. You managed to completely clear up this issue once and for all.  I just wanted to be sure you knew exactly how much you’ve changed my life. I no longer having this issue hiding in the background. You have restored my faith in "What goes around, comes around".  I can’t say thank you enough.

I had an outstanding experience with Yankwitt, LLP. They are incredibly knowledgeable, highly responsive, and demonstrated an extraordinary command of detail throughout our case. They were appropriately aggressive in advocating for us, and we always felt fully supported every step of the way.

I want to specifically recognize Jason Swergold, who exceeded every expectation. His judgment, communication, and professionalism gave us complete confidence, and we never doubted him for a moment.

I would not hesitate to retain Yankwitt, LLP again if the need ever arises. Truly exceptional representation.

This firm, and specifically Jason Swergold, are outstanding lawyers. I have nothing but praise for the work they did for me. They truly cared about me and my case, and they are extremely professional and competent. They defy the lawyer stereotypes!
Russell and his team are outstanding attorneys!
Stay away...

reviews.text: Great attorneys

Yankwitt LLP has represented me in multiple cases related to my business, consistently providing exceptional counsel. Their team has employed highly effective strategies, resulting in favorable outcomes each time.  I am grateful for their support and guidance and happily recommend the firm to both individuals and businesses in need of strategic legal representation.

"Not only is Yankwitt LLP one of my go-to law firms when my clients seek a referral for legal advice or representation, but I even retained them when a dispute came up for me personally.  In that case, Yankwitt helped me to secure a quick and favorable settlement in advance of litigation, minimizing my legal fees and alleviating the time, expense, and stress of litigation."
Do not recommend

Yankwitt LLP has earned its reputation as Westchester's go-to law firm for high-stakes bet- the-company litigation. Not only do they achieve outstanding results for their clients, but Russ and his team are known throughout the bar and judiciary as leaders in the legal and greater Westchester communities. I recommend Yankwitt LLP to my clients in need of counsel related to commercial or civil litigation.

Russell, you have an amazing team, and I am so grateful for the work you and Cassandra did on my case.  Winning all our motions and having the Court order that Plaintiffs were not entitled to any money restored my faith in the legal system.  I wish you and your team tremendous success in the New Year.

Many years ago, at the recommendation of a national restaurant chain, we turned to Yankwitt LLP for a hotly contested litigation matter. After Russell successfully handled that, we turned to Yankwitt LLP for all our litigation needs in New York and New Jersey. As the general counsel of a successful restaurant company with locations across the country, it is critical to hire outside legal counsel who are aggressive and trustworthy. I do not have time to micromanage cases. Their motions are crisp, persuasive, and on point, and Russell is a skilled negotiator – one of the best. When a matter occurs in New York metro area, I know I will receive the best legal advice at a fair and reasonable rate.

Yankwitt LLP saved my family business started by my grandfather. We faced a difficult and potentially damaging class action that threatened our livelihood. Faced with potentially insurmountable losses, we changed from our long-standing White Plains firm to Yankwitt LLP. Russell and Michael mounted a no-holds-bar defense by challenging the plaintiffs with aggressive questioning during the depositions and aggressive arguing before the court. Their excellent lawyering resulted in a class action settlement that enabled our business to not only survive but grow. After this experience, we made Yankwitt LLP our go-to law firm for our different companies. Their work is unmatched, and their rates are incredibly fair. In all the years they have represented us, we have never questioned one invoice, which is a first for us! Our decision to switch firms to Yankwitt LLP was one of the best business decisions we ever made.

Russell and his team at Yankwitt LLP have represented me and my company several times. Each time without fail, they provide legal strategies that resolve my litigation in the most efficient, cost-effective ways that keep me whole and enable me to continue running a successful business. To me, Russell Yankwitt and his colleagues at Yankwitt LLP are superheroes who swoop in to save the day.  I cannot thank them enough for everything they have done for me and my business. – Perry Verrone, Perry’s Roofing
Highly recommended

The attorneys at Yankwitt LLP gave me my life back.  More than two years ago, I was sued for wrongful death and accused of selling a defective used car to a woman who died in a car accident.  In fact, I did not sell a car to her and had never even met her. Needless to say, this was incredibly stressful and painful and took a serious toll on me and my family.  From my first meeting with the attorneys at Yankwitt LLP, I knew that I was in the right hands. They honored my belief in God and the power of prayer. Through their ingenious investigative work and unending tenacity, they not only proved that I had not sold the car, but they also found the person who did and who had forged my name on the sales documents.  Armed with this information and through their skillful advocacy, Yankwitt LLP persuaded the judge to dismiss the case against me.  I cannot thank Yankwitt LLP enough for believing in me, fighting for me and allowing me to put this two-year nightmare behind me.  It is blissful to sleep through the night again and have peace of mind.Thanks
again dear friends.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend this firm. I found it extremely difficult to reach anyone by phone, and although I was repeatedly told I would receive a callback, that often did not happen. I spent a significant amount of time trying to speak with someone directly.

Communication felt unprofessional to me. On several occasions, phone calls were answered with what I perceived as an attitude, and interactions did not feel courteous.

When I asked for updates on my claim, I received different answers from different people, which made me feel that my case was not being handled in a coordinated or organized way. Overall, this was a very frustrating and disappointing experience. I DO NOT recommend
I recommend this law firm they worked with my case from start to finish.
Stay away!!!! Worse workers compensation lawyer I have ever had. Never again.
I won't go into details, but this was the worst law office in every way.

Please do yourself a favor and avoid Cohen and Siegel. I have been a client for a couple of years and their communication is horrendous. I asked for an update/if they needed anything from me countless times only to hear no. Then over a year passes, and I was asked for things from the year prior=not doing their job.

Informing Cohen and Siegel that my employer would not provide certain documents the firm needed from me, you would think they'd formally request on my behalf being my lawyer. No, they asked that I retrieve the documents knowing my employer would be hesistant to provide things I have a right to ask for.

I provided my number and e-mail so long ago for contact purposes. And now I am unable to reach them by phone, however, they refuse to discuss my case with me via e-mail, Zoom, etc., and have ignored my e-mails going on almost two weeks at this point. They need to be reported.

If you receive care from Dr.  Hall (chiropractor) in Co-op City and they offer you this firm's card, throw it in the trash. I wish I never sought their service. I would have left, but I was unable to secure another lawyer due to the time that passed since my injury.
So far, I love them, especially my lawyer Jacob and Mr. Javier, who is always available to answer any questions. I've recommended them to several people and will continue to do so.

Unfortunately I am still working with this firm. Things started out great three years ago with me switching to them as my Workers Comp Attorney's. Its disheartening to see how they reduced my enthusiasm for there practice in handling my case. It wouldn't be fair to refer this firm to anyone as I have done in the past. Please get everything in writing. The appointed attorney wasn't even willing to determine what was best to suit my case, but left it up to me to pick a direction with improper follow ups with hearing, insurance carriers, Doctors, prior attorneys documents and client communications as if they were compensating me to do their work.
They've been so helpful and responsive. Truly a blessing! I'm so grateful to have them on my side!

I have 2 worker's compensation cases with this law firms. And my attorney Jacob Miranda, and his legal assistants has all been diligent with dealing with all of my issues, and my concerns. They has always returned my calls and taken action toward the insurance company's in my cases. I have not settled on any case of yet. However, I'm very pleased so far.

So bad
Dont go with them .. bad service
One word ridiculous
Grat lawyers
great Lawyers and will work with you
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!

reviews.text: Amazing lawyers! I would refer everyone I know to these guys! They are personable and genuine and really make an effort to get to know your case. Not only do you have great attorneys but the paralegals are just as great. 10/10, Oh by the way their new office is super nice and really made me feel welcomed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Chris- Thank You, We appreciate the kind words

reviews.text: Workers Compensation Law Firm. If you are injured at Work, injured in an Automobile Accident, Construction Accident, Slips and Falls, I highly recommend Cohen & Siegel. These guys care. They treat you like a person not a number. They make sure you get excellent medical care near where you live. They have offices throughout the tri-state NY area. Spanish speaking as well. They also handle Social Security Disability. Mention my name, you will be treated like a VIP.

My brother hired them as his “lawyers” but unfortunately they don’t ever do anything in regards to his worker compensation case. It’s been over a year and nothing yet has come out of his case. I am a witness to my brother calling and calling and never has there been a reply. Please please go to someone else who has more responsibility and has more consideration in a case. These “lawyers” unfortunately don’t cut it and not to mention there receptionists, their parents didn’t show them respect nor Have matters on how to answer phone calls. Its disgusting to me to see that this is their job, because at the end of the day they are all getting paid for what they are doing and it’s not a favor in which they are doing for my brother. Cause they come out with a pay check as well.

If I could give a no star trust and believe I would, but hopefully if you see this review please stay away. I would rather you Waste your time looking for someone else than here...!!!!!!!!
Everyone at Lebson Tangredi PLLC was professional and very easy to work with. They guided us through the process from start to finish. We were very pleased and highly recommend them.

reviews.text: In addition to Andrea displaying outstanding legal expertise, she was also always empathetic, direct and informative, calm, reassuring, responsive, and an incredible advocate overall. I am forever grateful for Andrea's support during this challenging journey, which I can happily and proudly say I overcame with her by my side.

Before working with Andrea, I was with a lawyer that didn’t prepare, didn’t fight for my rights as a father and was lazy. Andrea was diligent, listened and worked with what I wanted to accomplish and with her expertise and experience, I am able to raise my daughter. I will be hiring andrea for every court proceeding. She is a blessing from God.

After a very, very lengthy custody battle which lasted almost 5 grueling, emotionally draining years, It is finally over thanks to Andrea!  She is tough, fair and doesn’t beat around the bush. She will tell you how it is. During this complicated, in-depth case, we had to navigate through many different situations in which Andrea implemented different tactics which essentially helped us come out in top. David was amazing as well and helped us out quickly in many sticky situations!  Thanks again to the whole staff, they were fantastic and helped me regain my peace on many different occasions . I absolutely will be using Andrea again if need be because I feel very comfortable with her representing me. And that’s very important.

I engaged Andrea Friedman after working with another law firm for a year and seeing little progress.  At our first meeting, I could see that we would work well together.  Andrea was quick and to the point and laid out the path ahead of us without missing a beat.  Despite having an adversary with deep pockets and an aggressive attorney anxious to drag things out, Andrea steered us through the process calmly and methodically.  I was thrilled with our settlements both from a financial and custody perspective and very much enjoyed working with Andrea.  Can't write enough good things about her and the whole team!
Working on getting help
Andrea Friedman and her staff understand the difficulties of high conflict divorce cases. I highly recommend them.

No one wants to go through a divorce (at least, I didn't--and didn't personally choose that course of action). But Andrea Friedman, David Rubenstein, and the whole staff at Friedman & Friedman were professional and kind. They didn't try to act as my therapist or grief counselor. They simply focused on the legal issues that were important to me and helped me both act fairly myself, and also protect myself. I couldn't have been happier with their service, and highly recommend this firm, and Andrea in particular, if you find yourself in a similar situation.

I finalized my terms for divorce today after three heart wrenching years. I want to thank Andrea Friedman and her team for their support which began from the day I first walked into the office. Andrea's kind and supportive ways is what we all should have during these times. She listened and understood and gave me the guidance I needed to make a decision without fear. Thank you Friedman team. I'm ready to start living again!
Andrea is very efficient, professional and responsive. Working with Andrea was a positive experience and she met and exceeded my expectations. Would highly recommend her legal services.

Andrea Friedman has become a strong system of support for me during such difficult times.  I am currently in the long drawn out process of custody with my daughter’s mother. Andrea Friedman is perfection in my eyes and I feel overwhelming confident in my case since hiring her law firm.  I would recommend Andrea Friedman to anyone that has been dealing with a difficult case, in any aspect.

Andrea  Friedman and her team are a pleasure to deal with. Andrea is an excellent lawyer who i highly recommend. She is very well versed with Divorce and Family law and i certainly made the best decision in hiring Andrea.

Friedman and her team and I honestly believe that I would not have received the same results, if I went to any other attorney. Highly recommend her to anyone!

Andrea Friedman is an outstanding divorce and family law attorney who combines expertise and knowledge of the law to quickly identify issues, take decisive action and deliver optimal results. I’ve come to learn how important the filing package is and the lawyers have a huge input into how everything is framed and this is where a bad lawyer could be harmful.  We couldn’t have been more happy with the results.  Highly recommend!!

An unbelievable smooth and fast process with Parandian Law Firm! I am from the UK and started the green card process after getting marriage. We was recommended Parandian Law Firm and reached out to them before getting marriage to understand the process and they informed us on all information. After getting marriage we started the process with them and they guided us along the way with any questions and concerns we had. I can honestly say this process can be extremely frustrating as information and procedures are not clear so it’s great to have a team that can make it as easy as possible and help you along the way. I got my green card In record time, quicker than anyone I’ve spoken to so they clearly don’t something right! I can't thank them enough for making this stressful process an absolute breeze.

I had an exceptional experience with Parandian Law Firm regarding my marital-based immigration case. From the very beginning, their team demonstrated professionalism, expertise, and a deep understanding of immigration law that instantly put me at ease. They meticulously handled every aspect of my case, ensuring that all paperwork was filed correctly and on time, which significantly reduced the stress and uncertainty of the immigration process.

What stood out to me was the personalized attention I received. The attorneys took the time to understand my unique situation and tailored their approach accordingly, showing a level of care and commitment that was truly remarkable. Their communication was excellent, keeping me informed and engaged throughout the entire process, and they were always available to answer my questions and address my concerns.

I am deeply grateful for their support and would highly recommend their services to anyone in need of knowledgeable and compassionate immigration legal assistance.

Working with Parandian Law Firm has been beyond fantastic. My wife and I were referred by a family member to Parandian to handle my Permanent Resident application. Kamran was the lawyer handling my case with his team. They went above and beyond throughout the process to accommodate us. He’s extremely knowledgeable and thorough.
From arranging an affordable payment plan for us to answering questions we had over the phone or email promptly. My wife and I are forever grateful for everything. By the way, their office is absolutely first class, when you walk in you will know you’re at the right place.

I highly recommend Parandian to anyone that is in need of immigration services.

Adding an update 2022 citizenship application:
My wife and I returned when it was time for my citizenship filing. Karman and his team were excellent. They prepared my citizenship application; if I’m not mistaken June or July of 2022 was when my app was submitted to USCIS. By October, I was given an interview date. The entire process was smooth, I was given study materials to prepare for the interview. I had the option to go with Kamran. I went by myself and after my interview Kamran followed up to check how everything went.
I can’t thank Parandian Law Firm enough. If you are in need of immigration services do yourself a favor and go with them. It will be one of the best decisions you’ll ever make.

Kamran is very thorough, and diligent with his work. He made the immigration process as seamless as it can be.

reviews.text: It's never easy to deal with a parent's last will & testament before they pass. But Patricia Micek listened to my Mother's concerns and wishes and made it a little easier. I recently had the pleasure of working with the law office of Patricia G. Micek to set up my estate plan, including a trust, will, power of attorney, and health care proxy. From our very first meeting, Pat impressed me with her professionalism and deep knowledge of estate law. She took the time to listen carefully to my concerns and goals, and explained every step of the process in clear, understandable terms.
Throughout the process, Pat was extremely efficient and attentive. She responded promptly to my questions, whether by phone or email, and made sure I felt comfortable and informed at every stage. I appreciated her mindfulness and her willingness to walk me through the documents, ensuring I understood the implications of each decision.
What stood out most was Pat’s genuine care for her clients. She was patient, never rushed, and always made me feel like my needs were her top priority. The entire experience was smooth and stress-free, thanks to her expertise and thoughtful approach.
I highly recommend Patricia G. Micek to anyone looking for guidance with estate planning or related legal matters. She is not only knowledgeable and efficient but also compassionate and truly dedicated to her clients’ best interests.
Excellent advice and outstanding service. My greatest legal worries have been relieved by simply signing the TRUST that Patricia and her staff prepared for me.

From my very first call with Andrea, Patricia G. Micek’s secretary, I felt I was in capable and caring hands. Referred by our long-time accountant, I quickly understood why he spoke so highly of Patricia. With my husband in a nursing home, the stress of our situation made it clear I needed legal guidance.
During my first visit to the facility on June 23, 2025, I was stopped by Mark, the accountant, who bluntly told me, “It costs $600 a night to stay here,” before I even reached my husband’s room. His tone was inappropriate and confrontational, and he has since continued to call me, repeatedly mentioning the cost. Patricia advised that I could report his conduct.
When my son and I met with Patricia, she welcomed us warmly and immediately put me at ease. She listened closely to both the legal and personal challenges we faced, offering expert advice with genuine compassion. Patricia guided us through updating wills, establishing trusts, and planning for the future — all with clarity and care.
If you need an elder law attorney who combines deep expertise with heartfelt empathy, I wholeheartedly recommend Patricia G. Micek. She is truly exceptional.

Her ability to explain complex legal matters in an approachable and compassionate way made us feel informed, understood, and confident in our decisions.

We highly recommend Patricia G. Micek and her staff without reservation. It’s rare to find someone so knowledgeable and attentive—we are very grateful for her support and expertise.

This review is years overdue, and I regret not writing it sooner. I hired Jasmine Hernandez because she markets herself as a champion for fathers in child support and custody cases. That could not have been further from the truth.

My experience with her was terrible from start to finish. She was rude, dismissive, condescending, and completely unresponsive unless it involved collecting more money. Every phone call felt like an inconvenience to her, despite the fact that I was paying extremely high fees. She acted as if she was doing me a favor rather than providing a service I hired her for.

Not only did she fail to advocate for me, and make me lose my case, but her attitude made an already stressful situation even worse..

I cannot stress this enough: I would never recommend her to anyone, especially fathers who are genuinely seeking fairness, justice, and an attorney who will actually fight for them. Save yourself the stress, disappointment, and money

reviews.text: Our children's education is the bedrock of our society's future. Most parents would never hesitate to send their child to college, but few ever imagine they will need the help of an attorney to keep their local district from ostracizing their child, and killing those dreams before they even get started. Your child's education is worth your investment at every stage. Schools should be making decisions based on the best interests of the child, but all too often prioritize what's cheapest and easiest for the school and staff. If you have been disappointed, shocked by what your child is put through at school, if your child is coming home hurt, defeated, angry, humiliated, you need the protection and guidance of Gina DeCrescenzo. She knows what schools are required to do. She will light the way, and not be cowed by the school's excuses. You can't count on the school to provide you with accurate information. Some don't even realize what their obligations are, and what resources are available. With her experience and qualifications to take the fight all the way to court if need be, she knows what needs to be done to ensure your child will receive the educational support they deserve to overcome their challenges, and achieve scholastic success. Worth every penny, and way cheaper than private school. Your child's future is so worth it. Don't give up. Do everything you can to help them succeed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Diana. I am so happy that L is now thriving in his new setting. He deserves that. You should be proud of yourself for fighting the good fight. It was a pleasure fighting alongside you!

In the time that I worked with her, she secured an Individualized Educational Evaluation for our son for OT, Speech, Psychological and ABA evaluations from some of the best people in the Hudson Valley.  Through this, my son was given the proper classification and the opportunity to thrive.

Though no journey is bump-free, my son is now getting ready to graduate from high school and his future is beyond great.  All of his teachers see amazing things for him due to his passion and intellect, along with great empathy for the needs of others.

As a parent, I know I had a part to play in all of this, but so did Gina.  If you are looking for someone to help your child achieve everything they can be, look no further than reaching out to her for all of your legal needs.

Her amazing paralegal Charlene was able to connect us with expert therapists for evaluations and a variety of support resources, along with diligently responding to our numerous emails. And when the time came for our hearing against the department of education, not only did she win our case, she secured us a resolution with so many extraordinary benefits for our son that we never thought possible. This entire experience has been life changing for us and has finally given us hope for our son’s future. For all this we are forever grateful to Gina DeCrescenzo and her dedicated team. I have been meaning to write the review for years. Hearing the most recent TV ad boast the "5 star" review, it is time for me to offer another truthful fact based alternative perspective.
My sisters and I inherited (literally) an estate first when our mother passed in 2014. I am a professional with extensive experience in, among other things trust's and estates.  I first read their planning documents after my mother passed. Their overall plan was complete cookie cutter. Not one element tailored to their circumstances. Moreover, the documents were extremely sloppy, for example there were defined terms that were not defined.
Trusts were not effectively used, too much we left for the will. The assignment of executor was flawed.  Worse yet, the overall construction left assets out of their planning, causing me time, effort, money to fix.
My parents got free coffee and cake for attending a seminar. They left with a really bad estate plan.
Every time I watch those TV commercials my blood boils and it's been over a decade since my mom passed.
BEWARE OF THIS FIRM
excellent, professional and customer service
